critical_failures.message: Each nowcast row points to the monthly snapshot corresponding to the same vintage.
critical_failures.details: The validation parses the vintage directly from monthly_snapshot_path and compares it to vintage_period.

major_failures.message: Block-level news approximately reconciles with the nowcast revision across vintages.

warnings.message: Block-level news approximately reconciles with the nowcast revision across vintages.

passed_checks.message: Artifact nowcasts exists at the expected Layer 1 path.
Artifact diagnostics exists at the expected Layer 1 path.
Artifact news_blocks exists at the expected Layer 1 path.
Artifact news_series exists at the expected Layer 1 path.
Artifact coverage exists at the expected Layer 1 path.
Artifact md_manifest exists at the expected Layer 1 path.
Artifact qd_manifest exists at the expected Layer 1 path.
Artifact catalog exists at the expected Layer 1 path.
Protocol file protocol exists.
Artifact states_parquet exists at the expected Layer 1 path.
Representative monthly and quarterly raw files infer the expected calendar frequencies from first-of-period date strings.
The audit does not detect accidental month-end or quarter-end timestamp drift.
Representative raw-file max dates match the expected vintage cutoff rather than an artificial future date.
The final estimated vintage is capped by the actually available raw and target data.
The serialized Layer 1 protocol points to the same output directory used by the current notebook.
The serialized Layer 1 protocol points to the same repository root used at validation time.
Each Layer 1 row targets the quarter implied by the monthly vintage label.
The within-quarter origin code is consistent with the monthly vintage position inside the quarter.
The model sample ends exactly one month before the vintage marker, consistent with first-of-month vintage semantics.
No series uses more current-quarter monthly observations than the vintage should permit.
The quarterly GDP target history does not leak the target quarter or any later quarter into pseudo-real-time model inputs.
Layer 2 candidate lag features do not inject ex post third-release residual information into pseudo-real-time rows.
The estimated nowcast panel covers the full internal monthly span without unexplained vintage gaps.
Stable-subset transformation codes match the raw snapshot metadata for representative anchor series.
Stored model standardization moments reconstruct exactly from the vintage-specific monthly panel.
All intended factor blocks survive the preprocessing pipeline in representative vintages.
Representative transformed panels retain a large enough share of the intended stable monthly series.
The diagnostics table contains one row per nowcast row.
Exported Layer 1 artifacts are unique on their identifying keys.
The state-space model uses proper PeriodIndex row labels rather than generated synthetic integer indices.
EM log-likelihood paths are monotone non-decreasing across vintages.
A large majority of vintages satisfy the notebook's own convergence flag.
Most vintages converge before hitting the configured EM iteration cap.
Exported factor-state vectors are finite and do not exhibit explosive magnitudes.
Stored endog standard deviations are positive and finite.
No factor block loses an implausibly large share of its intended observed series across vintages.
Pseudo-real-time accuracy metrics are available for at least one operational truth view.
The DFM performs at least as well as the best transparent vintage-safe benchmark on the main truth view.
There is adequate overlap between nowcasts and realized truth for empirical evaluation.
News decomposition rows are available for almost every revision-bearing vintage.
The sign of block-level news comoves with the sign of the overall nowcast revision.
The Layer 2 candidate design table is unique on (vintage_period, target_quarter).
There are enough realized residual targets to support a non-trivial Layer 2 residual model.
The candidate Layer 2 feature matrix is not dominated by mostly missing columns.
Factor-state features are available for Layer 2 feature engineering.

remediation_items: Repair artifact joins if any nowcast row references the wrong source snapshot.
Separate pure-news revision effects from parameter re-estimation effects, or export the full revision decomposition explicitly.
